user.title: Connect your Pluxee account
user.description:
1. Open this login link in your normal web browser:

{auth_url}

2. Log in with your Pluxee email, solve the captcha and enter the one-time code sent to your email.
3. Your browser will land on a page that shows a loading spinner — that is expected. Copy the **full address-bar URL** (it starts with `https://consumers.pluxee.at/oidc/callback?code=...`).
4. Paste that URL below within ~60 seconds.

**Optional — stay logged in:** to avoid re-authenticating every few hours, also paste the session cookie. In the same browser, press **F12 → Network**, click any request to `connect.pluxee.app`, open **Headers → Request Headers**, and copy the entire **`Cookie:`** value (it contains `op_session`; alternatively, paste the `op_session*` rows from the Application → Cookies tab). Paste it in the second field.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Pluxee

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Pluxee

error.no_code: Could not find an authorization code in what you pasted. Make sure you copy the whole URL that contains `code=`.
error.invalid_auth: Login failed or the code expired. Open the link again, log in and paste the new URL quickly.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Pluxee. Please try again.
error.session_cookie_invalid: The session cookie is not valid (no `op_session`, wrong format, or expired). Copy the full `Cookie:` request header for `connect.pluxee.app` (it must include `op_session=...`), or leave the field empty to continue without it.

abort.already_configured: This Pluxee account is already configured.
abort.wrong_account: The account you logged into does not match the one being reconfigured.

data.transaction_count: Number of recent transactions to keep (0 to disable)
